ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie (e.g., Action, Comedy, Drama) */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the review (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the review (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the review (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., user, critic) */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the reviewer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the reviewer joined the platform */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the reviewer has posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotions" (
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotion */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review expressing the emotion */,
  "emotion" TEXT /* Name of the emotion (e.g., Happy, Angry, Surprise) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the emotion (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the emotion detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotions_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "review_history" TEXT /* History of reviews made by the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "favorite_genres" TEXT /* Favorite genres of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie (e.g., Action, Comedy, Drama) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report configuration */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of report generation (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report configuration used to generate the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the user with the movie (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the movie was viewed */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the movie received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the movie (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date the sentiment trend was recorded */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews contributing to the sentiment trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_trends_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
